Collegedunia Team

Content Curator | Updated on - May 3, 2026

VMMC cutoff is available for NEET-PG, NEET, IPU-CET, NEET-SS here. You can check category wise VMMC cutoff for popular courses such as M.D, M.S, MBBS, B.Sc {Hons.}, B.Sc, BPO, DM, M.Ch, DNB below.

VMMC offers admission to M.D through NEET-PG. For Admission in M.S courses, VMMC accept NEET-PG score. You can check the table below to know the accepted exams for courses offered by VMMC (Cutoff Range below is across all categories).

Course Exam Cutoff
M.D NEET-PG 25 - 208663
M.S NEET-PG 322 - 24628
MBBS NEET
132 - 121011 (All India)
B.Sc {Hons.} NEET
68655 - 343940 (All India)
B.Sc IPU-CET 41 - 370
BPO IPU-CET 73 - 451
DM NEET-SS 7 - 571
M.Ch NEET-SS 8 - 2419
DNB NEET-SS 262

VMMC NEET-PG Cutoff 2026

Students can take admission in M.D, M.S programs at VMMC based on NEET-PG score. As per VMMC NEET-PG Cutoff 2025, the overall cutoff for M.D programs in Round 3 is 25 - 208663 across all categories.

  • For M.S, The Overall closing rank in 2025 in Round 3 is 322 - 24628 across all categories.

M.D Dermatology, Venereology & Leprology, M.S General Surgery, are the top choices for students appearing in NEET-PG.

In 2025, M.D Dermatology, Venereology & Leprology closing rank for OBC Category is 293 in Round 3.

  • For M.S General Surgery, The NEET-PG closing rank 2025 for OBC is 1072 - 2659 in Round 3.

You can check M.D Dermatology, Venereology & Leprology, M.S General Surgery, category-wise closing rank for NEET-PG below:

VMMC M.D Dermatology, Venereology & Leprology Cutoff 2025

Category Closing rank
OBC 293
General 142

VMMC M.S General Surgery Cutoff 2025

Category Closing rank
OBC 1072 - 2659
General 322 - 451
SC 6089
ST 4296 - 6394
EWS 906

VMMC NEET-PG Cutoff Trends

Admission at VMMC in M.D Programs in 2025 was closed at 208663 rank whereas closing rank in 2024 was 141666 across all categories.

  • Admission in M.S Programs in 2025 was closed at 24628 rank whereas closing rank in 2024 was 139975 across all categories.

VMMC NEET Cutoff 2026

Students can take admission in MBBS, B.Sc {Hons.} programs at VMMC based on NEET score. As per VMMC NEET Cutoff 2025, the overall cutoff for MBBS programs in Round 4 for AI Quota is 132 - 121011, across all categories.

  • For B.Sc {Hons.}, The Overall closing rank in 2025 in Round 4 for AI Quota is 68655 - 343940, across all categories.

MBBS , B.Sc {Hons.} Nursing, are the top choices for students appearing in NEET.

In 2025, MBBS closing rank for General Category for AI Quota is 132 in Round 4.

  • For B.Sc {Hons.} Nursing, The NEET closing rank 2025 for General for AI Quota is 68655 - 84280, in Round 4.

You can check MBBS , B.Sc {Hons.} Nursing, category-wise closing rank for NEET below:

VMMC IPU-CET Cutoff 2026

Students can take admission in B.Sc, BPO programs at VMMC based on IPU-CET score. As per VMMC IPU-CET Cutoff 2025, the overall cutoff for B.Sc programs in Round 2 is 41 - 370 across all categories.

  • For BPO, The Overall closing rank in 2025 in Round 2 is 73 - 451 across all categories.

B.Sc Medical Laboratory Technology, BPO , are the top choices for students appearing in IPU-CET.

In 2025, B.Sc Medical Laboratory Technology closing rank for BCNOAI Category is 176 - 286 in Round 2.

  • For BPO Bachelor of Prosthetics and Orthotics [BPO], The IPU-CET closing rank 2025 for BCNOAI is 282 - 319 in Round 2.

You can check B.Sc Medical Laboratory Technology, BPO , category-wise closing rank for IPU-CET below:

VMMC NEET-SS Cutoff 2026

Students can take admission in DM, M.Ch, DNB programs at VMMC based on NEET-SS score. As per VMMC NEET-SS Cutoff 2024, the overall cutoff for DM programs in Round 1 is 7 - 571 across all categories.

  • For M.Ch, The Overall closing rank in 2024 in Round 1 is 8 - 2419 across all categories.
  • For DNB, The Overall closing rank in 2024 in Round 1 is 262 across all categories.

DM Pulmonary Medicine, M.Ch Gynecological Oncology, DNB Endocrinology, are the top choices for students appearing in NEET-SS.

In 2024, DM Pulmonary Medicine closing rank for General Category is 7 in Round 1.

  • For M.Ch Gynecological Oncology, The NEET-SS closing rank 2024 for General is 8 in Round 1.
  • For DNB Endocrinology, The NEET-SS closing rank 2024 for General is 262 in Round 1.

You can check DM Pulmonary Medicine, M.Ch Gynecological Oncology, DNB Endocrinology, category-wise closing rank for NEET-SS below:

  • Admission in DNB Programs in 2024 was closed at 262 rank whereas closing rank in 2023 was 511 across all categories.

Cutoff Summary: VMMC

The NEET 2025 cutoff for admission to VMMC ranges from 132 to 84280 for the General category. For the M.B.B.S. program, the last round cutoff was 132. The B.Sc (Hons.) Nursing course recorded a Round 1 cutoff of 68655 and a last round cutoff of 84280. For OBC candidates, the admission cutoff was 232 for M.B.B.S. and ranged from 79866 to 93425 for B.Sc (Hons.) Nursing.

In the SC category, the cutoff was 2934 for M.B.B.S. and between 220525 and 225329 for B.Sc (Hons.) Nursing. The ST category cutoff stood at 7556 for M.B.B.S., with the B.Sc (Hons.) Nursing cutoff ranging from 281486 to 313348. For the EWS category, the M.B.B.S. cutoff was 693, and the range for B.Sc (Hons.) Nursing was 95431 to 100095.

VMMC: 1 Answered Questions

How many marks should I score to get a seat in VMMC with the Delhi quota?

Sanjana KapoorVMCC Delhi

VMMC is a prestigious medical college among M.B.B.S. aspirants. Admission to this college is solely on the basis of the NEET exam. It’s well-reputed for its internal PG option. Here is the detailed cutoff for Home State candidates

Category

Round 1

Round 2

General

1532

1556

OBC

6021

5968

SC

40277

42316 

ST

93864

-

EWS

3580

-

Based on NEET Marks vs. Rank, candidates with Delhi Quota General Category need to score 560+ marks to get a seat.
